source_pr.title: kv: merge batch get results to fix insert ignore in a transaction block
source_pr.body:
Merge the batch get results with buffer store to fix insert ignore bug when it is in a transaction block.
PTAL @coocood

symptoms: testSQL = `select * from test order by i;` (executor/write_test.go)
failure_signature: testSQL = `select * from test order by i;` (executor/write_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: testSQL = `select * from test order by i;` (executor/write_test.go)
files: executor/admin.go, executor/write.go, executor/write_test.go, kv/mock.go, kv/txn.go
